channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla is last in the 'Magnificent 7' rally — and the first tech giant to report earnings: Chart of the Day
item.description: Since the broader market's March 30 low, Tesla is up only 11%, dead last among its "Magnificent Seven" tech peers.

item.title: Tesla Terafab AI Chips Add New Layer To High Valuation Debate
item.description: Tesla is expanding its in-house semiconductor effort through the Terafab AI chip complex, with new job postings highlighting work on advanced 2nm class AI chips. The Terafab facility is positioned to support Tesla's autonomous driving, robotics, and data center projects, with a goal of reducing r...

item.title: Bull vs Bear: Is Tesla Stock a Buy or Sell?
item.description: Here's a look at the bullish and bearish cases for Tesla stock.

item.title: Inside one of Amsterdam's first supervised self-driving Teslas
item.description: STORY: Kees Roelandschap navigates down the narrow streets of Amsterdam without his hands on the wheel of his Tesla. It follows the U.S. carmaker getting surprise approval from the Netherlands for its supervised full self-driving - or FSD - system It's a European first for city streets and could ...

item.title: Tesla Earnings Need To Show 'Tangible Progress' In Scaling FSD, Morgan Stanley Says
item.description: To justify its lofty valuations, Tesla will need to show meaningful updates on efforts to scale its Full Self-Driving (FSD) software, according to Morgan Stanley. Shares fell on Monday.

item.title: Will Tesla’s FSD pivot save its margins? Q2 earnings preview
item.description: Stifel NextGen Transport Analyst, Stephen Gengaro, joins Julie Hyman on Market Catalysts to tell investors what they should expect on Tesla's (TSLA) earnings call.

item.title: Tesla May Have a Big Surprise in Store for Investors on April 22
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) reports first-quarter 2026 results on April 22 after the market close. The bar for this quarter is more meaningful than usual. A year ago, Tesla delivered one of its worst earnings surprises on record, and the comparison now sets up a potential inflection point.

item.title: Tesla Q1 Earnings: What Elon Musk and Co. will answer during the call
item.description: Tesla ( NASDAQ: TSLA ) is set to hold its Earnings Call for the first quarter of 2026 on Wednesday, and there are a lot of interesting things that are swirling around in terms of speculation from investors. With the company’s executives, including CEO Elon Musk, answering a handful of questions t...

item.title: Here’s Why Rowan Street Capital Holds Steady on Tesla (TSLA)
item.description: Rowan Street Capital, an investment management company, released its Q1 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The first quarter of 2026 left investors with plenty of concerns.

item.title: Will SpaceX steal the show during Tesla's earnings call?
item.description: Yahoo Finance's Julie Hyman and Myles Udland discuss how Tesla (TSLA) earnings expectations have changed over time, and whether Elon Musk or SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) will take the spotlight this quarter.

item.title: Tesla’s EV Rebound Just Got Real — Iran War Sends EV Demand Soaring
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East have tightened the global oil spigot once more. The U.S. maintains its naval blockade of Iranian ports, Iran fired on two tankers in the Strait of Hormuz over the weekend, and the U.S.

item.title: Week ahead: Tesla earnings, Iran tensions, and Fed drama test fragile market rally
item.description: Wall Street heads into the new week juggling three major forces: a packed earnings calendar, fast-moving geopolitical risks in the Middle East, and a series of macro events that could shape interest rate expectations. Even after the S&P 500 ended last week at a record high, sentiment is...

item.title: Tesla Earnings: EV Sales Gain As Cash Flows Turn Negative
item.description: Tesla will report earnings after the close on Wednesday. Analysts expect auto sales to be up 12%, even as the company burns through almost $1.5 billion to fund Elon Musk's AI ambitions.

item.title: Elon Musk reveals shocking Tesla Optimus patent detail
item.description: Elon Musk revealed a shocking detail on the Tesla Optimus patent that was revealed last week. Despite it being made public for the first time, Musk said the company has already moved on from the design, an incredible truth about the development of new technology: things move fast. Musk dropped a ...

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises After Snapping 8-Week Losing Streak. Earnings Are Up Next.
item.description: The electric-vehicle maker reports first-quarter results on Wednesday. Wall Street is looking for earnings per share of 36 cents from sales of $22.3 billion.

item.title: Tesla Q1 earnings preview: Robotaxi rollout, mega capex spending in focus
item.description: Tesla will report first quarter earnings after the bell on Wednesday, with Wall Street focused on the company's slow-to-evolve Robotaxi rollout and capital expenditures, which are expected to balloon due to the company's AI ventures.

item.title: Tesla Q1 Earnings Preview: Ready For Its Next Big Move
Why Tesla's Valuations Are Finally Justified (Rating Upgrade)
Tesla Q1 Earnings Preview: Why I See Downside Ahead (Rating Downgrade)
Dow Jones Futures Fall; Trump Says Talks, Iran Says No; Marvell Jumps, Tesla Earnings Due
item.description: Futures fell and oil prices jumped as Iran said it has "no plans" for new talks that President Trump touted. Marvell jumped on a reported Google deal. Tesla earnings loom.

item.title: Market Chatter: Tesla Reportedly May Have Shifted $18 Billion Offshore to Cut US Taxes
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) likely transferred $18 billion in profits to international units to reduce its domestic

item.title: Tesla's energy storage division to pick up slack as car margins drop and credits fade
item.description: Tesla's solar and energy business is likely to outshine the EV maker's challenged core business when it reports quarterly results this week, a sign of resilience as Tesla ‌progresses slowly in its turn to robots and self-driving technology. CEO Elon Musk's plans to build new assembly lines ‌and p...

item.title: Tesla Reports Earnings Wednesday. Here's How Much Its Stock Is Expected to Move
item.description: Tesla is set to report earnings Wednesday afternoon, with traders expecting a big move from the electric vehicle maker's stock following the results.

item.title: Tesla Stock Investors Just Got Good News From Elon Musk About a Trillion-Dollar Market
item.description: Tesla's robotaxis business is expanding into new markets.

item.title: Car Owners Are Revolting Over Tesla’s Self-Driving Promises
item.description: When Tom LoSavio bought his Tesla Model S in 2017, he thought he was buying a car that would one day drive itself. Tesla Chief Executive Elon Musk said that the hardware in the company’s cars would eventually allow all of its cars to drive themselves. “My wife and I talked about what a grea...

item.title: Fed Chair Hearing, Tesla Earnings: What to Watch This Week
item.description: Earnings season kicks into high gear this week, with nearly 20% of the S&P 500 scheduled to report quarterly earnings. Big names reporting include Tesla, Boeing and Intel. Investors will also watch the scheduled testimony of Kevin Warsh, President Trump’s nominee for Federal Reserve chair, for si...

item.title: Tesla’s Robotaxis Just Went Live In Dallas And Houston. Good Luck Finding One
item.description: Tesla started offering autonomous taxi rides in the two Texas cities, but the service network is tiny. For now, at least.

item.title: Tesla is sending its humanoid Optimus robot to the Boston Marathon
item.description: Tesla’s Optimus humanoid robot will be stationed at the Tesla showroom at 888 Boylston Street in Boston, right along the final stretch of the Boston Marathon today, ready to cheer on runners and pose for photos with spectators. According to a Tesla email shared by content creator Sawyer Merritt o...

item.title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights Tesla
item.description: Tesla have been highlighted in this Investment Ideas article.

item.title: American Express, Tesla and Halliburton are part of Zacks Earnings Preview
item.description: American Express, Tesla and Halliburton have been highlighted in this Earnings Preview article.

item.title: Is Tesla Stock a Buy in the Second Quarter of 2026?
item.description: Tesla isn't just selling cars anymore. It's chasing a future powered by AI, robotaxis, and humanoid robots.

item.title: Is Tesla Stock a Buy Ahead of Earnings This Week?
item.description: The electric carmaker's high valuation demands outstanding performance. Can Tesla deliver?

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Jump; Trump Announces New Iran Talks With Hormuz Shut
item.description: Futures fell and oil prices jumped with Iran keeping the Strait of Hormuz under "strict control." President Trump announced new talks Monday. Tesla earnings loom.

item.title: Tesla Has Reclaimed Its Spot as the Leading Global EV Manufacturer, but Is the Stock a Buy?
item.description: There's far more to the story.

item.title: Jim Cramer on Tesla: “We Want to Hear About Self-Driving Cars, We Want Robots”
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) was one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s recent Mad Money game plan. Cramer emphasized that investors do not wish to hear any more about “autos” from the company, and explained: After the close, we get Tesla.

item.title: Wall Street Brunch: Tesla Reports As Earnings Season Picks Up
Tesla, Intel, Boeing, Capital One, and Many More Stocks to Watch This Week
item.description: Roughly 90 S&P 500 Index companies are set to report earnings this week. Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh will appear before the Senate Banking Committee, and we’ll see data on pending home sales and purchasing managers’ activity..

item.title: Tesla’s ‘Robotaxi’ expansion looks like another stock pump before earnings
item.description: Tesla launched its “Robotaxi” service in Dallas and Houston yesterday — expanding to two new cities for the first time since Austin. There’s just one problem: there are virtually no cars available. Data from Robotaxi Tracker shows that Tesla’s new Houston and Dallas deployments have had 0% to 2% ...

item.title: Tesla Earnings, Hormuz and Other Key Things to Watch this Week
item.description: Markets face an interesting week following conflicting signals about Strait of Hormuz access as Iran's Foreign Minister announced Friday the waterway was "completely open" citing an Israel-Lebanon ceasefire

item.title: Elon Musk Says 'More' Tesla Diners Are Coming After Hinting Where The Next Location Could Be
item.description: Elon Musk said more Tesla Inc. Diners are coming, confirming an expansion of the retro-futuristic charging-and-food concept just days after he hinted that the next site could be in Palo Alto, California. Musk Signals Wider Diner Expansion Ahead On X, Musk reposted a clip from Tesla North America ...

item.title: 1 Reason I'd Still Buy Tesla Stock Hand Over Fist and Never Sell
item.description: Nothing else matters if Tesla can execute on one massive growth catalyst.

item.title: Stock market records, Iran updates, and Tesla earnings: What to watch this week
item.description: In the week ahead, ceasefire talks, record highs for the US stock market, and Tesla earnings will be in focus for investors.

item.title: Applied Materials Drawn Into Musk Terafab AI Chip Ambitions
item.description: Elon Musk's team has approached Applied Materials to supply key semiconductor manufacturing tools for the new Terafab project. Terafab is planned as a vertically integrated AI chipmaking complex serving Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI, with involvement from Intel. The engagement positions Applied Material...

item.title: What to Watch in Markets This Week: Tesla, Intel, Airline Earnings Reports; March U.S. Retail Sales
item.description: Investors are looking for insight on consumer health ahead of the Fed's meeting next week.

item.title: Why April 22 Could Be a Huge Day for Tesla Investors
item.description: Tesla will report 2026 first-quarter earnings and hold a conference call with analysts.

item.title: Jim Cramer Says “I’m Blessing Rocket Lab (RKLB) Because It’s Got a $1.85 Billion Backlog”
item.description: Rocket Lab Corporation (NASDAQ:RKLB) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls, as he discussed the rising market speculation. Cramer said that stocks like RKLB are likely to go higher before SpaceX’s IPO. Space is easier because of the mammoth IPO of SpaceX brought to us soon by Elon Musk, maybe later ...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA): The Best Stock to Buy for the Next Decade
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the 10 Best Stocks to Buy for the Next Decade. On April 15, 2026, TD Cowen lowered its price target on Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Tesla owner uses emergency solar to trickle charge after running out of battery in desert
item.description: A YouTuber driving a Tesla Model X the entire length of the Americas ran out of battery in Chile’s Atacama Desert — the driest place on Earth — and had to deploy emergency solar panels on the side of the highway to survive. The whole ordeal, captured on video, is a fascinating look at both the pr...

item.title: Dow Jones Futures, Oil Prices In Focus As Iran, Hormuz News Turns
item.description: How will markets react as Iran says the Strait of Hormuz is still under its "strict control"? Tesla earnings loom.

item.title: Finally, Tesla Is Said to Be Developing an All-New SUV -- but That's Not the Biggest Surprise
item.description: At long last, Tesla may be on the verge of adding a new vehicle to its aging lineup, and there's even more to the story.
